mapper.select: SELECT user_seq, user_id, mdn, service_status, setting_value, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_seq, user_id, mdn, service_status, setting_value, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user WHERE mdn = #{mdn}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET service_status = #{serviceStatus}, setting_value = #{settingValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT cust_num, auth_kind, filter_kind, email_kind, email_addr1, addr_flag, kisa_agree, addr_dt, cb_sms_flag, cb_sms_term, cb_sms_clc, dynm_flag, wifi_id, wifi_date, msg_dn_time, notice_dn_time, url_holdoff, push_flag, push_key, platform_version, fsec_agree, impersonate_agree, block_international, block_roaming FROM customer_profile WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_configurations_history ( cust_num, last_visit_dt, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{decodeUserID}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_visit_dt = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
